---
name: Schedule correction
about: Report an incorrect lesson, teacher, room, or time
title: "[Schedule] "
labels: bug, schedule
assignees: ""
---

## Group

Example: `4-6`

## What is wrong now

Describe the current incorrect data.

## What it should be

Describe the corrected version.

## Evidence

Attach supporting material if available:

- screenshot
- PDF
- Word file
- Excel file

## Additional context

Anything else that helps verify the correction.
